PATIENT_COMPLAINTS.description: Incomplete discharge instructions, lack of progress reports to family members, and provider explanation gaps.
Prolonged emergency waiting times, delayed diagnostic slots, and surgical deferrals.
Medication discrepancy concerns, sub-optimal pain management, and nursing attentiveness complaints.
Felt disrespected or dismissed, clinical empathy gaps, and lack of professional introductions.

CIHI_ALL_READMISSION_RATES.Trend note: Queen Elizabeth II Hospital (Alta.) no longer exists. Data from Queen Elizabeth II Hospital (Alta.) will now be attributed to Grande Prairie Regional Hospital (Alta.), Mackenzie Place (Alta.) and Queen Elizabeth II Hospital Ambulatory Care Centre (Alta.) as of December 04, 2021.
